title: Support Leader
description_text:
1Kosmos is a leader in identity verification and passwordless authentication, serving global enterprises, financial institutions, and government agencies. With a mission to secure identities for citizens, customers, and workforce, we combine advanced biometrics, distributed identity, and user-friendly authentication experiences into a unified platform. We maintain 99.999% uptime and power critical security and access workflows for organizations with massive scale—including workforce, retail, telecom, and citizen services.

As we continue to grow, we are investing heavily in Customer Success, Implementations, and Support to ensure flawless delivery, high adoption, and world-class customer experience.

We are seeking a Support Leader to build, mature, and scale our global Support function. This leader will own the end-to-end support experience—from frontline response through root-cause analysis, escalations, and continuous improvement. You will work closely with Customer Success, Implementations, Product Engineering, and Cloud Infrastructure to ensure our customers experience seamless, timely, and effective support.

This is a hands-on leadership role where you will help design the operating model, set standards, introduce process rigor, and transition the team as we move to tools like Freshdesk. The ideal candidate has deep experience supporting enterprise SaaS platforms (identity or security preferred), thrives in fast-growing environments, and brings an exceptional customer-first mindset.

Key Responsibilities:

Leadership & Vision

              •            Build and lead a high-performing global Support team (currently India-based; manage future expansion plans in North America).

              •            Define the support model for a scaling security/identity platform with mission-critical use cases.

              •            Own the global support strategy, including staffing, processes, tooling, reporting, and customer experience.

Operational Excellence

              •            Drive day-to-day operations: ticket volume management, SLAs, escalations, and queue health.

              •            Lead the rollout and optimization of Freshdesk across teams, integrating CSMs, engineering escalation paths, and self-service.

              •            Establish and enforce SLA/SLO frameworks, incident management processes, and on-call rotations.

              •            Introduce metrics-driven performance management (CSAT, FCR, MTTR, backlog trends, etc.).

Customer Experience

              •            Act as the executive escalation point for high-priority customer issues, including large enterprises and government clients.

              •            Ensure consistent, timely, and high-quality communication with customers during incidents and outages.

              •            Collaborate with Customer Success to ensure support readiness for new deployments, pilots, and rollouts (across Passwordless product line, Identity Verification)

Cross-Functional Collaboration

              •            Partner with Implementations to ensure smooth handoffs, standardized runbooks, and post-go-live readiness.

              •            Work closely with Product & Engineering to drive bug triage, root cause analysis, and quality improvements.

              •            Coordinate with Cloud/DevOps for incident response and maintenance windows.

Process & Continuous Improvement

              •            Develop and maintain an internal knowledge base and external customer-facing help center.

              •            Introduce training and certification pathways for support engineers.

              •            Implement systems for proactive monitoring, early issue detection, and reduction of repetitive support requests.

              •            Improve stability and resilience by collaborating on product and platform feedback loops.

Requirements

Experience

              •            8+ years in Technical Support or Customer Support roles, including 3+ years managing support teams.

              •            Experience supporting enterprise SaaS platforms (identity, security, IAM, CIAM, MFA, or adjacent domains strongly preferred).

              •            Background supporting customers with high-availability, mission-critical workloads.

              •            Demonstrated ability to operate in a scale-up environment and build process maturity.

Skills & Competencies

              •            Strong understanding of authentication, MFA, identity verification, SSO/OIDC/SAML, and related concepts (or willingness to ramp quickly).

              •            Exceptional leadership, communication, and crisis management skills.

              •            Ability to collaborate cross-functionally with Engineering, Product, CS, and Implementations.

              •            Experience designing and managing on-call rotations and 24/7 support coverage.

              •            Proficiency with modern support tools (Freshdesk preferred).

Mindset

              •            Customer-first, always.

              •            Bias toward action and continuous improvement.

              •            Calm under pressure with strong executive presence.

              •            Passion for scale, structure, and building world-class processes.

⸻

Nice-to-Have

              •            Experience supporting government customers (FedRAMP environments preferred).

              •            Experience in identity, cybersecurity, or fraud prevention products.

              •            Previous involvement in implementing new support tools or migrating from legacy systems.

⸻

What You’ll Gain

              •            Opportunity to build and transform the Support function of a rapidly scaling identity security company.

              •            Direct influence on customer satisfaction, retention, and platform reliability.

              •            Ability to shape processes, tooling, and team culture from early stages.

              •            Collaboration with top-tier enterprise customers across multiple industries.

Benefits

  • Hybrid work model with flexibility.
  • Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives.
  • Comprehensive benefits package including health, dental, vision, 401(k), and more.

title: Network Solutions Architect Lawful Intercept & Compliance - Lisbon/Dublin based
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

As 1GLOBAL expands into new markets, it's critical for us to maintain compliance in these new jurisdictions. This position entails planning, provisioning, testing and managing software that is used to meet regulatory requirements for lawful interception requests.


You will collaborate with 1GLOBAL engineers and the Legal, Regulatory, Security and Technology teams to develop country-specific solutions, manage and test the entire software lifecycle, and ensure alignment on Lawful Intercept and compliance projects. Additionally, you will oversee multiple projects, communicate with national authorities to translate legal requirements into scalable solutions, and perform as a subject matter expert for Lawful Intercept within the company.

About the Role

  • Engage with the all stakeholders (internal and external) to determine the technical and processual requirements, risks, technical impacts to understand the best solution for each country
  • Manage multiple concurrent projects and provide regular updates on schedule and deliverables to senior management
  • Take ownership of the conversation with national authorities with respects to turning their legal requirements into actionable, scalable, and sustainable solutions
  • Design of new Lawful Interception integrations for the different lawful enforcement agencies in all the different MVNOs and countries
  • Collaborate and create processes, together with Legal, Security and Regulatory teams, applicable to security and compliance of lawful intercept processes
  • Act as the technical point of contact for all engineering and integration issues relating to Lawful Intercept projects and create alignment across all partners
  • Drive the complete lifecycle of the relevant software, including testing with various law enforcement agencies around the world
  • Collaborate with lawful interception operational processes and procedures
  • Collaborates with technical teams in defining reliable, modular, scalable, compliance centric solutions, as well as planning and reviewing solutions
  • Design and present solutions in documents and workshops. For the solution identifies the impacts, efforts and the resources needed
  • Market prospection of new solutions through elaboration and analysis of Request for Information/Proposal/Quotation processes and negotiation with potential suppliers
  • Follow up of new technology trends in the Telecom industry and identifying interesting solutions for the lawful interception domain
  • Definition and follow up of company technological evolution roadmaps
  • Documents the existing technology portfolio and proposes recommendations for improvements and/or alternatives
  • Ensure and control quality of documentation execution (HLD’s, LLD’s, Changes, etc.)
  • Ensure and control implementation quality, including software upgrades. Understanding of end to end system testing requirements in a compliance environment
  • Ensure the network is compliant with industry standards and regulations with regards to lawful interception
  • Capacity and Performance Analysis, Reporting and Improvement Solution Definition
  • Reaches out to other teams and works towards alignment and overall continuous improvement

Requirements

About You

Must Have

  • Degree in Telecom Engineering or Computer Science or equivalent experience
  • English proficiency mandatory, other languages are a plus
  • Excellent understanding of Mobile Networks and its architectures
  • Experience with MVNO architecture(s) and landscape. Familiar with roaming environment, including its technical, commercial and regulatory aspects
  • Experience in lawful interception frameworks (ETSI, CALEA, etc.) and standards in mobile networks
  • Experience with lawful intercept gateways, mediation and delivery functions
  • Experience with service interception in Core Network functions (CS and PS Voice, SMS/MMS, Data)
  • Experience with interception in 5G Core Mobile Networks
  • Experience with lawful interception procedures and associated processes
  • Experience in communications with telecom regulators and lawful enforcement agencies and sensitivity of such communications
  • Experience with LTE, 5G, IMS, IP technologies and protocols
  • Solid knowledge of networking principles & protocols, including security
  • Experience in writing High Level Designs and Low Level Designs, and presenting internal and external documents
  • Familiarity with monitoring tools and protocols in Mobile Networks
  • Proactive attitude, anticipating problems and addressing them before they cause impact
  • Ability to work in complex environments (multi-cultural/multi-country/geographically distributed teams)
  • High attention to detail. Doesn't leave things to be addressed or left undone
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills


Nice to Have

  • Business oriented, capable to engage and discuss with non technical persons in order to create technical requirements
  • Experience in setting up VPNs across multiple diverse vendors
  • Experience in generating and revoking security certificates
  • Experience with Legal and Regulatory processes of compliance
  • Security accreditations and certifications
  • +8 years working on telecoms, designing and implementing mobile core network services

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Support Engineer - Fresher
description_text:
About 1Kosmos:

1Kosmos develops advanced identity verification and passwordless multi-factor authentication solutions, helping organizations prevent identity fraud and secure online access. As a rapidly growing technology company, we serve global clients with innovative products that set new standards for security and user experience.

Position: Support Engineer (Fresher)

Location: Mumbai (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-Time
Shift: Rotational Shifts

Role Overview

We are looking for enthusiastic and customer-focused fresh graduates to join our Support team. As a Support Engineer, you will assist customers in resolving technical issues, manage support tickets, and help ensure the smooth operation of 1Kosmos products and services. This role provides an excellent opportunity to build a career in cybersecurity, identity management, and technical support.

Key Responsibilities

·       Respond to customer queries

·       Troubleshoot and resolve product-related issues in a timely manner.

·       Monitor and manage support tickets according to defined SLAs.

·       Assist in incident, problem, and change management activities.

·       Collaborate with Engineering, Product, and Customer Success teams to resolve customer issues.

·       Document solutions, troubleshooting steps, and knowledge base articles.

·       Support customer onboarding and configuration activities.

·       Learn and follow ITIL-based support processes and best practices.

·       Assist with MFA configuration and identity management-related support requests.

Required Qualifications

·       Bachelor's degree in BCA, B.Sc. IT, B.E./B.Tech (IT/Computer Science), or equivalent.

·       Strong understanding of computer networks, operating systems, and web technologies.

·       Good analytical and problem-solving skills.

·       Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

·       Customer-focused mindset with a willingness to learn.

·       Ability to work in rotational shifts.

·        

Preferred Skills

·       Basic knowledge of Identity and Access Management (IAM).

·       Familiarity with Jira, Service Desk, or other ticketing tools.

·       Understanding of authentication technologies such as SAML, OIDC, OAuth, and MFA.

·       Knowledge of ITIL processes, including Incident, Problem, and Change Management.

·       Basic understanding of cloud technologies and SaaS applications.

What We Offer

·       Exposure to enterprise-grade security technologies.

·       Structured learning and growth opportunities.

·       Hybrid work model based in Mumbai.

title: Account Manager/ Project Manager
description_text:
The 1000heads Account team is a proud, powerful collective of social media obsessives who are experts in managing clients relationships. You will work closely with a whole host of departmental specialists, from Creative, Insights, Design, and Strategy to deliver transformational social-first work for our clients.

We are looking for an enthusiastic, solution-oriented account manager with strong interpersonal and organizational skills. Playing equally significant internal and external roles, the successful candidate will join as an integral member of this high-profile team and will balance priorities cross-department to deliver high quality work. 

The ideal candidate has agency experience, with a mix of production and social marketing experience. Experience working on large accounts is preferred due to the fast-paced environment. While influencer/talent work is a plus, a strong understanding of social channels and ATL production is essential. 

Responsibilities

  • Consistently developing innovative and creative ideas and solutions for client campaigns
  • Building client relationships; listen and understand individual client requirements and consistently meeting if not exceeding their expectations
  • Developing a clear understanding of your clients’ brand(s), category and customers
  • Monitoring and understanding your clients’ markets; be aware of market issues and competitive activity
  • Keeping clients informed; ensure reports are on time and are kept in a central location so the rest of the team can locate if necessary
  • Assisting in creating project briefs; briefing in and working with members of the wider team to develop an idea, strategy or campaign tactic; presenting and selling that idea to the client
  • Manage IRL and virtual event activations 
  • Developing effective project plans and project specification documents
  • Producing accurate cost estimates, and ensuring they are signed off by the Account Director and the client before work proceeds
  • Ensuring all billing is completed on time
  • Ensuring that campaigns run to agreed client budgets and clients approve all expenditure before it happens, particularly unexpected expenditure
  • Assisting with the production of client reviews with senior clients
  • Overseeing and owning the overall quality of the final deliverables on projects that you manage
  • Ensuring your Account Director and / or Creative Director signs off all briefs and attends important project meetings
  • Maintaining a central file of essential client information
  • Managing Timelines

Requirements

  • This is a hybrid role, with 2 days per week in office required.
  • 2-5 years of proven agency experience (with social agency or client experiences preferred)
  • Budget management
  • Ability to multi-task
  • The ability to think strategically and scrappy
  • Comfortable being in and leading the day-to-day work of account management
  • Culturally connected — you love all things social!

Benefits

  • Medical, dental, vision, and more!
  • Generous time off package, including the last week of the year
  • 401k & Roth retirement investment options with employer match after one year
  • Gym and professional development stipends
  • Culture Club with monthly activities like sports, games and happy hours
  • DEI Council and Employee Resource Groups
  • Commute and parking benefits
  • Wellness program that focuses on mental, physical and financial employee wellness
  • And much more!

SALARY RANGE

$70,000 - $92,000 per year

ABOUT 1000HEADS

1000heads combines expertise in data & analytics, strategy, technology and creativity to help the world’s best businesses build Social Age brands. 1000heads provides a fully integrated, end-to-end Social Transformation™ proposition to blue-chip clients encompassing data & analytics, strategy and implementation. 1000heads has a global footprint, employing over 200 people across 12 offices in London, New York, Los Angeles, Miami, Chicago, Bogota, Sydney, Melbourne, Kuala Lumpur, Japan, Paris and Berlin. 1000heads’ clients include Alphabet, Nature Made, The North Face, San Pellegrino, Amazon, Cisco, and Diageo.

1000heads is an Equal Opportunities Employer, we are passionately committed to working together to promote an inclusive environment which celebrates and promotes diversity. We are committed to our belief that diversity in our team generates better and bolder ideas, creativity, understanding and respect. We welcome applicants irrespective of age, sex, race, ethnicity, disability and other factors that have no bearing on an individual’s ability to perform their job.

For more information on 1000heads, visit 1000heads.com.

title: Regional Training Manager

title: Senior QA Automation Engineer - Software & Technology
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.


About the Team
You will work closely with our international engineers and product managers on a day-to-day basis, playing a key role in the development and success of our products. As the owner of quality within the team, you will ensure that our high standards are not only maintained but continually improved. You will collaborate with the team to implement best practices and identify areas for enhancement.

We are open to hiring for the position in Lisbon, Portugal; and São Paulo, Brazil.

 
About the Role

  • Automate API and UI Tests 
  • Consult developers and product managers regarding test approaches 
  • Review manual and automated test cases 
  • Provide insight and improve the quality of our products 
  • Ensure that automated test cases are reliable, stable and maintainable

Requirements

About You

  • At least 2 years of experience in API and UI automation
  • Good understanding of test design, testing pyramid and test approaches
  • Experience in UI and API testing using code-based automation tools (e.g  Playwright, Cypress, Selenium)
  • Experience with a high-level language, preferably JavaScript, TypeScript or Go.
  • Capable of working independently in a structured, fast-paced environment.
  • Good oral and written communication skills, with a self-motivated and autonomous mindset.

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Freelance Insights Manager
description_text:
We are looking for a talented Freelance Insight Manager to join our Insights team

The Insight team at 1000heads are a dynamic data-driven force, tasked with exploring what makes online consumers tick, understanding how brands are perceived by their communities and are responsible for extracting compelling stories from data. With a wealth of powerful analytics tools at our disposal, the Insight team crafts performance reports, new business proposals and strategic audits of global award-winning brands, working with a host of departmental specialists, from Community, to Paid Media, to Strategy. From designing mouth-watering data visualizations, keeping our clients up-to-date with the latest audience behaviors, to engineering social listening exercises into cultural trends, our actionable insights are at the heart of everything we do. If you possess a devotion to data, an appetite for analytics and are passionate about connecting brands to data-driven strategies, Insights at 1000heads is the perfect team for you!

Salary: $300 - $400 day

Key Responsibilities

  • Execute insight projects involving social listening, audience research, and data analysis across multiple client accounts.
  • Collaborate with senior team members and account teams to define research briefs and deliver clear, impactful reports.
  • Assist in developing and applying research methodologies and measurement frameworks to ensure data accuracy and insight consistency.
  • Analyze data from social listening platforms, digital analytics, and third-party research to identify trends and provide actionable recommendations.
  • Create compelling data visualizations and reports to communicate findings effectively to internal teams and clients.
  • Support and work alongside junior insight staff, contributing to their development and knowledge sharing.
  • Manage multiple projects efficiently, ensuring timely and quality delivery.
  • Stay current on emerging tools and techniques to continuously improve insight capabilities.

Requirements

  • 3-5 years of experience in research, data analytics, or social media marketing, preferably in an agency or client-facing role.
  • Proficiency with social listening platforms, audience measurement tools (e.g., Global Web Index), and digital analytics.
  • Strong foundation in research design, data analysis, and reporting.
  • Skilled in data visualization tools such as Excel and PowerPoint.
  • Demonstrated ability to turn complex data into clear, actionable insights.
  • Effective communication skills and ability to collaborate across teams.
  • Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects concurrently.
  • Deep understanding of major social media platforms and their strategic applications

Preferred Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree required; coursework or training in quantitative fields, research, or marketing analytics is a plus.
  • Experience or interest in methodology development and integrated measurement frameworks is beneficial.
  • Eagerness to learn and contribute to innovation in social and digital measurement.

Benefits

As a Network Engineering member, in the Voice and Services functional area, you will be responsible to propose, analyze and define the requirements for new and existing services and systems, related with the voice systems under the responsibility of the functional area. Prepare, design, test and provide new solutions or product changes of the already existing portfolio. Define and support the technology evolution roadmap for the systems under the functional area. Participate and support the other functional areas in cross functional projects.


About the Role

  • Collaboration with other Networks teams in defining and managing the projects for delivery of new solutions
  • Project delivery. Network design. Integration and migration strategy definition. Collaboration with other relevant departments. Responsible for end-to-end delivery
  • Design of new consumer and corporate telecom solutions
  • Creation of technical documentation (HLD’s, LLD’s, WO’s, etc.) and maintain it over the lifecycle of the solutions
  • Perform implementations in live environment. Understanding of End to End system testing requirements
  • Follow-up and define Quality and Performance indicators
  • Capacity and Performance Analysis, Reporting and Improvement Solution Definition
  • Service & Resource configuration definition and implementation on requested systems
  • Work on complex solutions that influence the design of current products and addresses design issues for future products or technologies
  • Close relationship with external partners like carriers, service providers
  • Elaborate, and manage the process, for change requests to current partners in order to meet the network necessities
  • Control the network elements roadmap, being responsible for the necessary software/hardware upgrade during the components lifecycle
  • Generate and implement process improvements, including and especially cross-team processes
  • Documents the existing technology portfolio and proposes recommendations for improvements and/or alternatives

Requirements

About You

Must Have

  • Proven experience on implementation of live solutions on mobile telecom (GSM, UMTS, LTE, IMS), networks design, capacity management, engineering and architecture
  • Knowledge of 3GPP, GSMA, ITU standards and specifications
  • Experience in the design, test and operation of NGN based networks, including MSS/MGW, HLR/HSS, SBC
  • Experience in defining, establishing and maintaining voice interconnects, SIP/RTP based
  • Understanding about IMS architecture. Knowledge about VoIP, VoLTE, VoWiFi, and QoS
  • Experience with SMS service configuration and routing
  • IMS Architecture with understanding of IMS nodes including P/S/I-CSCF, Application Servers
  • IMS Protocol Interfaces – GM Interface, ISC interface, Sh Interface, Cx, SOAP/XML, etc.
  • Experience in mobile services charging (offline, online). Knowledge and experience of OCS and, Ro, Ro+, Ga and Bp interfaces
  • Knowledge and experience with Diameter/SCTP networks and protocol
  • Knowledge and experience with Signaling Gateways and protocols including SS7, SIGTRAN, MAP and CAMEL
  • Experience with protocol analyzer tools like Wireshark, Astelia, and ability to use them to troubleshoot networks errors/problems for the mentioned protocols
  • Experience with ETSI NFV architecture and solutions
  • Familiar with MVNO/MVNE/MVNA architecture(s) and landscape
  • English proficiency mandatory, other languages are a plus
  • Degree in Telecom Engineering or Computer Science or equivalent experience


Nice to Have

  • +3 years working on telecoms, designing and implementing mobile core networks
  • Previous experience with Nokia, Oracle and Ribbon IMS products

  • Quarterly performance bonuses to reward your hard work and achievements
  • Meal allowance paid into Caju card — R$100 per working day
  • Health insurance with SulAmérica — 50% covered by the company
  • Extended parental leave — 180 days of maternity leave and 20 days of paternity leave

Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Oracle ECE and OCOMC Expert to strengthen our charging and billing operations and empower our charging & billing team. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in Oracle’s charging and mediation platforms, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into practical training for non‑technical billing staff. This role bridges IT and business operations, ensuring accurate, scalable, and efficient handling of large volumes of usage events and billing data, in real time, providing team the technical knowledge and skills to manage and monitoring OCS in a way that delivers high levels of service availability to our customers with high level of accuracy in usage events rating, earning from our customers their trust and confidence in the service 1GLOBAL provide them. 

This role positions the expert as both a technical authority in Oracle ECE/OCOMC and a trainer who empowers the billing team to handle large volumes of usage events effectively and securely.

Key Responsibilities

System Expertise

  • System Expertise
  • Act as the subject matter expert on Oracle ECE (real‑time rating and charging) and OCOMC (offline charging mediation), with special focus on the following areas:
  • Network integration (Diameter protocol)
  • ECE customization
  • Monitoring
  • Configure, optimize, and maintain the charging system for high‑volume usage events.
  • Ensure seamless integration between charging, mediation, and billing systems.
  • Participate in the design and implementation of complex business and technical requirements, ensuring robustness, scalability, and alignment with Oracle’s best practices.
  • Contribute to capacity planning, performance tuning, and platform evolution to keep the system resilient and cost-efficient as the business scales.


Training & Enablement

  • Develop and deliver structured training programs for the billing team, focusing on maintenance, operation, and monitoring of ECE and OCOMC.
  • Create clear documentation, guides, and best practices tailored to billing operations.
  • Conduct workshops and hands‑on sessions to build confidence in analyzing event‑level data.


Operational Support

  • Collaborate with IT, Finance, and Operations to streamline billing workflows.
  • Provide guidance on troubleshooting discrepancies in rated events, mediation records, and invoices.
  • Recommend improvements to reporting and data access, including the use of replicated databases for secure read‑only queries.
  • Help in improve monitoring tools and methodology (knowledge on integration and development of monitoring tools in Grafana, Prometheus, Loki is a must) 

Requirements

Must-haves

  • Proven expertise in Oracle ECE and OCOMC platforms, for 3 years or more
  • Strong knowledge of real‑time rating, charging, and mediation flows.
  • Strong knowledge of charging diameter protocol
  • Experience with SQL and database query optimization for large datasets.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills; ability to train and mentor non‑technical staff.
  • Understanding of telecom and subscription‑based billing models.


Nice-to-haves

  • Prior experience leading billing teams or training programs.
  • Experience with high‑volume event processing in telecom or digital services industries.

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.

Associate, Guest Solutions

Position Summary:

The Associate of Guest Solutions is the front line of the guest experience. This role is cross-trained on every Guest Solutions function and is expected to handle any guest interaction from first contact through final resolution. Associates take incoming calls, manage customer care issues, process service and warranty claims, coordinate delivery support, handle order management, schedule services, execute save strategies, and provide virtual in-store support via tablet and Teams. There are no separate queues or specialists - every Associate owns the full guest journey.

Job Duties:

•       Process service and warranty claims from intake through resolution

•       Coordinate delivery support including scheduling, tracking, and issue resolution

•       Manage post-purchase order tasks: ticket splitting, payments, messaging, and status updates

•       Execute save strategies when guests express intent to cancel or return, using authorized tools and offers

•       Provide virtual in-store support via tablet and Teams when stores have escalated guests on the sales floor

•       Follow up with guests proactively to ensure resolution and satisfaction

•       Maintain accurate records in CRM and ticketing systems for every interaction

•       Complete and maintain cross-training certifications across all Guest Solutions functions

•       Participate in team huddles, coaching sessions, and quality reviews

•       Support the store support Teams channel during assigned shifts

•       Meet individual KPI targets for CSAT, first-call resolution, saves, and follow-up compliance.

•        

Required Qualifications:

·       Education: High School diploma or equivalent, required.

·       Experience: 1+ year of customer service, call center, or guest-facing experience, required.

Physical and Work Environment Requirements:

title: Temp to Perm Account Director

In this contract role, we are looking for someone who has experience with large, complex clients, who can jump into a project and get up to speed quickly, and who can lead strategically while getting their hands in the weeds of the day-to-day work.

  5. Manage and track progress across functions, workstreams, and key milestones; oversee cross-functional execution to deliver on launch strategy and ongoing execution

KEY SKILLS

  • Very tapped into culture, music, entertainment, fashion, etc. Has impeccable taste where everyone wants their opinion to know what's cool 
  • Paid media campaign and creator experience
  • Experience running an influencer program and managing social media channels 
  • Experience creating and implementing social media strategies 
  • Experience running a $2M+ account
  • Familiar with clients in tech, electronics, telecom, or related
  • Big agency background, has worked with very large, complex client organizations

title: Influencer Marketing Manager
description_text:
The Influencer Marketing Manager will join the 1000heads Relationships team on a 6-month fixed term contract, supporting the delivery of social-first influencer, creator and advocacy campaigns for our clients.

 

You will play a key role in identifying, approaching, briefing and managing relationships with influencers, creators and influential voices. You will work closely with Client Services, Strategy, Insight, Creative, Design, Production and Project Management to help deliver high-quality, culturally relevant work that meets client objectives and maintains the standards expected of 1000heads.

 

This role is ideal for someone who understands the influencer and creator landscape, is confident managing multiple relationships at pace, and can balance creative ambition with operational detail, budgets, approvals and compliance.

Requirements

Creator, influencer and relationship management

  • Build and maintain strong, genuine relationships with influencers, creators and influential voices across a range of communities, platforms and client sectors.
  • Research, identify and verify relevant creators for campaign briefs, ensuring recommendations are strategically aligned, brand-safe and culturally credible.
  • Support profiling briefs and creator shortlists, ensuring the team has a clear understanding of the target audience, creator rationale and campaign opportunity.
  • Manage creator outreach, communication, negotiations, briefing, follow-ups and ongoing relationship maintenance in a timely and professional way.
  • Help ensure creator engagement is transparent, ethical and compliant with relevant campaign requirements, disclosure expectations and client standards.

Campaign delivery

  • Support the planning and delivery of influencer, creator and social-first campaigns from brief through to execution and wrap-up.
  • Work closely with internal teams to develop smart, creative and effective solutions for client campaigns.
  • Coordinate creator deliverables, content requirements, timelines, usage needs, approvals and live dates.
  • Support event and activation planning where creator or influencer attendance is required, helping ensure smooth delivery on the day.
  • Manage multiple projects and tasks simultaneously, adapting quickly when priorities, timelines or client needs change.

Client and internal collaboration

  • Build positive working relationships with client teams by listening carefully, understanding requirements and helping deliver against expectations.
  • Collaborate with Client Services to ensure communication, delivery and outputs are of the high standard expected by the agency.
  • Partner with Project Management and Finance teams to support budgets, third-party costs, invoices, purchase orders and supplier processes.
  • Work with Strategy and Insight teams to understand audiences, creator relevance and campaign performance.
  • Contribute ideas and recommendations that help improve the work, deepen creator relationships and strengthen the service we provide to clients.

Commercial, legal and compliance

  • Track budgets and creator costs accurately, ensuring spend is approved before commitments are made.
  • Support the administration of legal agreements, usage rights, contracts and creator documentation.
  • Maintain accurate records of communications, approvals, costs and deliverables.
  • Follow internal processes around time reporting, project tracking and financial administration.
  • Ensure all work is handled with appropriate confidentiality, professionalism and attention to data protection, anti-bribery and ethical standards.

Key Skills

  • 3–4 years’ experience in influencer management, creator partnerships, account handling, social media, PR, talent management or a similar agency/client-facing role.
  • Strong knowledge of the influencer and creator landscape, including platform behaviours, emerging talent, content formats and community dynamics.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Confident building relationships with creators, clients, suppliers and internal teams.
  • Strong organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns, timelines and stakeholders.
  • Comfortable handling budgets, invoices, contracts, approvals and campaign documentation.
  • Strong attention to detail and a calm, professional approach under pressure.
  • Good understanding of social platforms and social-first content.
  • A proactive, solutions-focused mindset.
  • A team-first attitude, with the flexibility to support where needed across projects.
  • This job description is not intended to cover everything that will be expected of you but rather to act as a guide and you maybe required to get involved in other and reasonable ad hoc projects.
  • Experience working in a creative, social, digital, PR or integrated agency.
  • Experience managing creator activity for events, activations or experiential campaigns.
  • Understanding of paid social, content usage rights, creator contracts and disclosure requirements.
  • Experience using project management, time-tracking or HR systems such as Basecamp, Workbook or BreatheHR.

title: IoT Sales Executive (German speaker) - New Business
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. The ideal candidate will have gained 5 years of experience in B2B sales, preferably in tech, SaaS, or telecommunications. Establish yourself as a trusted advisor to access and influence C-level stakeholders. Clearly articulate the value proposition and ROI of our offerings to multiple decision-makers.

  • Negotiation & Closing - Lead contract negotiations, including pricing and terms, in close collaboration with internal teams. Ensure seamless deal closure.
  • Sales Process Management - Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor activities. Actively track and report sales KPIs to the leadership team.
    Consistently meet or exceed assigned sales quotas and revenue targets.

Requirements

About You

Must-haves

  • Fluent English and German, written and spoken.
  • Minimum 5 years of successful sales experience, in a quota-carrying sales or business development role, ideally within the telecom, tech, or SaaS.
  • Proven track record of consistently exceeding sales targets.
  • Experience leading and closing complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles lasting 6+ months.
  • Demonstrated success in engaging and selling to C-level executives (CxOs).
  • Strong drive to learn, succeed, and lead by example.
  • Exceptional presentation, verbal, and written communication skills.
  • Strong emotional intelligence (EQ), with the ability to empathise, negotiate, and resolve challenges effectively.
  • Proficiency in managing full sales cycles through CRM tools and lead prospecting through social media and sales intelligence tools.
  • Highly organised, self-motivated, process-driven and with a strong forecasting discipline.
  • Ability to adapt and iterate sales approaches in a fast-paced startup environment.


Nice-to-haves

  • Experience in selling IoT is a plus
  • Good understanding of at least one of these verticals: Payments, Retail Tech, Fleet management, Mobility, Logistics and Asset Tracking, and Connected Consumer Electronics

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Business & Data Analyst - B2B2C
description_text:
About Us
1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.


About the Ideal Candidate
We are looking for a Business & Data Analyst to support our B2B2C business by turning complex commercial, operational, and product data into clear insights and decision-ready analysis. This role sits at the intersection of data, commercial performance, and business strategy.

About the Role

  • Own business and performance analysis across B2B2C products, partners, and markets.
  • Analyze large datasets using SQL, Excel, and analytics tools to identify trends, risks, and opportunities.
  • Build and maintain commercial and operational reports (revenue, margins, ARPU, churn, usage, onboarding KPIs, etc.
  • Translate raw data into clear narratives and recommendations for senior stakeholders.
  • Support pricing analysis, partner performance reviews, and business cases.
  • Work closely with Product, Sales, Finance, and Operations teams to align data with business reality.
  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and logical interpretation across reports and dashboards.

Requirements

About You 

Must-haves

  • 4+ years of experience in data analysis, KPI reporting, or business intelligence.
  • Strong SQL skills and experience working with data lakes or large datasets.
  • Proficiency with BI/DWH tools (PowerBI, Looker, Tableau) and advanced Excel/Google Sheets (pivoting, modelling, complex formulas).
  • Strong analytical ability with a solid understanding of business models, value chains, and technical systems.
  • Ability to navigate complex operations, understand performance drivers, and derive clear, actionable recommendations.
  • Experience supporting business case development, benchmarking, or strategic analysis.
  • Excellent communication skills — able to present complex insights in a simple and effective way.
  • High degree of ownership, proactivity, and the ability to drive tasks end-to-end.


Nice-to-haves

  • Telecom / MVNE / MVNO domain experience is an advantage.

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: AI / Machine Learning Engineer
description_text:
Are you ready to shape the future of authentication? Join 1Kosmos and help lead the next wave in identity assurance and passwordless innovation.

1Kosmos is driving the future of identity security, empowering organizations to eliminate passwords and establish trust at every step of the identity lifecycle. As a vibrant team of innovators, we develop advanced authentication solutions trusted by some of the world’s leading brands. Join us as we create a passwordless world and set new standards for digital identity assurance.

We are looking for an AI / Machine Learning Engineer to design, build, and deploy advanced computer vision and AI solutions. You will work on projects involving image capture, data extraction, and fraud detection, delivering high-performance models that can run on both mobile devices and cloud environments.

This role blends R&D with production engineering—you’ll take ownership of the full ML lifecycle, from dataset creation and model training to deployment and performance optimization.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement AI models for image classification, object detection, OCR, and feature extraction.
  • Develop real-time image quality assessment and capture guidance algorithms.
  • Create and maintain data pipelines for collecting, cleaning, augmenting, and labeling datasets.
  • Implement model optimization techniques for mobile (on-device) and cloud inference.
  • Apply fraud detection methods to identify tampering, forgeries, or replay attacks in visual data.
  • Integrate ML models into production-grade APIs and mobile SDKs.
  • Monitor, evaluate, and continuously improve model accuracy and performance.
  • Collaborate with product and engineering teams to align AI capabilities with business goals.

 

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field (or equivalent experience).
  • 3+ years of experience building and deploying ML models in production.
  • Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, or similar).
  • Experience with computer vision libraries (e.g., OpenCV) and OCR technologies.
  • Strong understanding of deep learning architectures for image and text recognition.
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and API development.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in fast-paced environments.
  • Based in the NJ / NY area; Hybrid working model.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with model quantization and optimization for mobile deployment.
  • Knowledge of synthetic data generation and data augmentation techniques.
  • Background in security, liveness detection, or anomaly detection.
  • Exposure to compliance and data privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA).
  • Contributions to open-source ML projects or published research.

Benefits

  • Cutting-Edge Tech Stack: Build with decentralized identity protocols, FedRamp High, FIDO2-certified cryptography, and NIST-compliant biometric systems. 
  • Accelerated Growth: Receive annual stipends for certifications and attend key conferences like Identiverse or EIC.
  • Ownership & Impact: We move fast and will enable you to make a big impact with large customers in US & Canada. 
  • Flexibility First: Unlimited PTO, and 2 days WFH

title: Social Media Manager
description_text:
About the Role:

1Kosmos is the leader in unifying identity proofing and passwordless authentication for enterprises, providing a trust platform for financial institutions, healthcare organizations, retailers, and government agencies.  

We're a fast-growing team looking for a B2B social media strategist and content writer hybrid who can own our social presence end to end. This is the single accountable owner for all things social at 1Kosmos, spanning four surfaces: our company channels, our executives' personal presence, our employee advocacy program, and our relationships with external influencers and advocates. You'll sit on a growing content marketing team, working closely with our Content Marketing Manager and Brand and Digital Director to build a social presence that both strengthens our brand and drives pipeline. 

You'll drive strategy, write copy, manage a consistent content calendar, direct visual production, and transform events and people into sustained brand momentum — before, during, and after. Primary channels include LinkedIn, YouTube, and X. 

What You'll Do:

You'll own all four layers of our social presence: company channels, executive personal brands, employee advocacy, and external influencer/advocate relationships as the single accountable owner. Specifically, you'll: 

  • Own social strategy and execution across LinkedIn (primary), YouTube, X, and emerging channels, setting the calendar and cadence rather than reacting to one-offs 
  • Run an employee advocacy program for executives and ~15–20 customer-facing employees: ghostwrite, coach, and equip people to post in their own voices to multiply reach 
  • Build and manage relationships with external voices — industry influencers, analysts, customer advocates, and partners — to extend reach and credibility, coordinating both sponsored and organic amplification 
  • Write on-brand copy for social posts, graphics, and thought leadership content with precision and voice consistency 
  • Produce and direct visual content on-site, either hands-on or by managing freelance photo/video resources, and hold a high quality bar 
  • Ship executive and customer video series on a consistent, reliable schedule 
  • Build a repeatable event content playbook: hype before, live coverage during, thought-leadership follow-up after, making 1Kosmos's presence at flagship events feel bigger than life 
  • Contribute to omnichannel campaigns spanning social, paid, and email 
  • Monitor the market: competitors, customers, and trends in identity security and AI; know the buyer (CISOs, security and IT leaders) well enough to make content land 
  • Measure KPIs such as reach, engagement, branded search lift, share of voice, and social's contribution to brand and pipeline 

Requirements

What You Bring:

  • 4–6+ years in B2B social media, content, or brand, ideally in enterprise SaaS, cybersecurity, or another technical, considered-purchase category 
  • A portfolio that includes campaigns, event coverage, or programs where you measurably moved engagement, reach, or brand awareness 
  • Strong writing across multiple voices: you can sound like a CISO one minute and the company the next 
  • Aesthetic and visual taste: you can produce content or manage those who do, and hold a high bar on quality 
  • LinkedIn organic fluency, plus working knowledge of paid social and how organic and demand gen reinforce each other 
  • Self-starter mentality: able to own a function, set strategy, and execute as the single accountable owner 
  • Tool proficiency: Sprout Social / Ayrshare, HubSpot, Wrike, Notion, Adobe Creative Suite, and core B2B social platforms 

 

Nice to Have:

  • Experience launching or scaling an employee advocacy program 
  • Experience building or running an influencer/advocate program 
  • Background in identity, cybersecurity, fintech, or selling to financial institutions 
  • Familiarity with AI content and social tooling 
  • Experience tying social efforts back to pipeline metrics 

Benefits

  • WFH
  • Medical, Dental, Vision
  • Life Insurance & 401k
